task_name: Add Phase Scanner Reject Edge Fixtures
goal: Add Phase Scanner fixtures for missing evidence and unsafe file scope rejects without changing scanner runtime behavior.
claims: BP-033 adds missing-evidence and unsafe-file-scope reject fixtures.
BP-033 covers the hard confidence caps for evidence and file-risk failures.
BP-033 does not change Phase Scanner runtime behavior or external integration behavior.
assumptions: Existing runtime behavior already rejects missing evidence and unsafe file scopes.
Golden fixtures plus existing output invariants are enough for this block.
The shared review suite will pick up invariant coverage for these new input fixtures.
dod: Missing-evidence reject fixture exists and is tested.
Unsafe-file-scope reject fixture exists and is tested.
stop_conditions: Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-032 added output invariant checks across all Phase Scanner input fixtures.
